name: insufficient_history_short_circuit
description: Fewer than the MC minimum-history threshold of valid_dates. run_monte_carlo MUST short-circuit and return the distinct out-of-band insufficient-history sentinel (MC_INSUFFICIENT_HISTORY_SENTINEL = None). Updated for Cluster 2 AC-2: the prior in-band 100.0 return was fail-dangerous (100 >= MC_SANITY_THRESHOLD permanently vetoed the protective trailing stop). This fixture pins the short-circuit path returns the out-of-band sentinel, not a probability.
derivation: len(valid_dates) = 10 < MC_MIN_HISTORY_DAYS (20). The function short-circuits at the first guard and returns MC_INSUFFICIENT_HISTORY_SENTINEL (None) — a distinct out-of-band signal, not an in-band probability. No producer value is pinned because the short-circuit returns before any Monte Carlo draw.
